name: Living Leaf Weave
description:
This suit of leaf weave armor is specially modified to metabolize the alchemical accelerants in medicinal compounds. A special receptacle in the armor can hold an Elixir of Life, which takes 3 Interact actions to install.

Activate 1 (manipulate)

Requirements An elixir of life is installed in the armor

Effect Slithering vines grow from the armor, granting an item bonus to Athletics checks to , to your Fortitude DC to resist Grapple, , or attempts, and to your Reflex DC to resist attempts. The bonus is equal to the elixir's item bonus, and lasts for 3 rounds. The activation uses up the elixir, and the armor can't be activated again until a new one is installed.
